Privacy_Page.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy_Page.intro: Noviant ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal information you share with us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect through our website, how we use and safeguard it, and the rights you have over your data. As an ISO/IEC 27001:2022-certified organization, the protection of information is central to how we operate.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect personal information only when you voluntarily provide it to us — primarily through our contact form. This may include:
items: The industry and solution you are interested in
Any message or details you choose to include

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information you provide solely to respond to your inquiries, provide the services or information you request, and communicate with you about your business needs. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party for marketing purposes.

sections.heading: 3. Third-Party Service Providers
sections.body: To operate our contact form securely, we rely on a small number of trusted third-party processors:
items: Formspree — processes and delivers contact form submissions to us by email. Your form data is transmitted to Formspree for this purpose.
hCaptcha — provides spam and abuse protection on our forms. hCaptcha may collect device and usage data to distinguish humans from automated bots, in accordance with the hCaptcha Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies and Tracking
sections.body: Our website does not use advertising cookies, analytics trackers, or third-party behavioral tracking. The only cookies that may be set are strictly necessary cookies required by hCaptcha to provide bot protection on our contact form. Because we do not perform tracking, we do not display a cookie consent banner.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain the personal information submitted through our contact form only for as long as necessary to respond to your inquiry and maintain a record of our business correspondence. You may request deletion of your information at any time using the contact details below.

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Our website is served exclusively over encrypted HTTPS connections, and our information security management system is certified to the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 standard.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.body: Depending on your jurisdiction (including under the EU/UK GDPR and the California Consumer Privacy Act / CPRA), you may have the right to:
items: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request deletion of your personal information
Object to or restrict certain processing of your data
Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent

sections.heading: 8. International Data Transfers
sections.body: Noviant is based in the United States, and the information you submit is processed in the United States and by our service providers. If you are accessing our website from outside the United States, you consent to the transfer and processing of your information in the United States.

sections.heading: 9. Children's Privacy
sections.body: Our website and services are intended for businesses and professionals. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 16. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us so we can remove it.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. Any updates will be posted on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date.

sections.heading: 11. Contact Us
sections.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:

Privacy_Page.contact_link_label: Or reach us through our Contact page

noviant-liquidedge-ai-pod-launch.title: Noviant Launches LiquidEdge AI POD: Liquid-Cooled AI Datacenter Container Solution
noviant-liquidedge-ai-pod-launch.excerpt: Noviant embraces the AI era by introducing the LiquidEdge AI POD — a factory-built, plug-and-play liquid-cooled AI datacenter container deployable in just 8 weeks, supporting NVIDIA GB200, H100, B200, RTX 5090, and AMD MI300X GPUs.
noviant-liquidedge-ai-pod-launch.body:
As artificial intelligence reshapes industries worldwide, Noviant is proud to announce our partnership with LiquidEdge to bring the AI POD liquid-cooled datacenter container solution to enterprise clients across New York and North America. This marks a significant step in Noviant's commitment to delivering cutting-edge AI infrastructure that meets the demands of the modern intelligence era.

The global data center industry faces an unprecedented challenge: AI compute demand is growing exponentially while traditional datacenter supply lags years behind. Conventional builds still require 36+ months due to grid interconnect queues, permitting delays, and construction lead times. The LiquidEdge AI POD was engineered specifically to solve this bottleneck.

The LiquidEdge AI POD is a 40-ft North American-spec ISO container housing a complete, factory-assembled liquid-cooled AI datacenter. Built and tested at the factory, it arrives on-site ready for connection — no civil works required, with fewer than 5 field crew members needed at installation.

• Factory-built and pre-tested before shipment
• Direct liquid cooling (DLC) achieving PUE ≤ 1.15
• Operating range: -40°C to +50°C, IP55 outdoor-rated enclosure
• 8-week factory-to-live delivery timeline
• Fully relocatable and redeployable
• North America compliant: UL 891, NEC 2023, NFPA 75/76, ASHRAE TC 9.9

The LiquidEdge AI POD is available in three configurations to match different workload requirements:

LE-44 (Single-Rack / Edge): 44 kW IT load, supporting up to 64× NVIDIA RTX 5090, 32× H100/H200, or 24× B200 GPUs. Ideal for AI inference, fine-tuning, and edge AI deployments.

LE-88 (Twin-Rack / Mainstream): 88 kW IT load, supporting up to 128× RTX 5090 or 64× H100/H200. Designed for Neocloud operators and GPU-as-a-Service providers.

LE-200 (Quad-Rack / Heavy): 200 kW IT load, supporting one complete NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 system (72 GPUs) or up to 256× RTX 5090. Built for large language model training and hyperscaler bridge capacity.

All three configurations use direct liquid cooling (DLC) with cold-plate technology that captures ≥80% of GPU heat into the coolant loop, enabling the industry-leading PUE ≤ 1.15 — dramatically better than the 1.50–1.70 PUE typical of air-cooled facilities.

The AI POD also features an integrated AIOps platform with 4,000+ telemetry points per unit, a CFD-validated digital twin for workload simulation, and predictive maintenance capabilities that flag hardware degradation 72+ hours in advance.

Noviant is now accepting inquiries and pre-orders for the LiquidEdge AI POD. Our team will work with you to assess your power availability, GPU requirements, and deployment timeline to identify the right configuration for your business. Contact our AI infrastructure team today to schedule a consultation.

Welcome to the Noviant News & Insights hub.

We created this space to keep you informed about the latest developments in enterprise IT, managed services, and AI infrastructure — all from the perspective of a team that works with these technologies every day.

What to expect here:

phunware-partners-with-noviant.title: Phunware Partners with Noviant to Bring Pandemic Response Solutions to Cities
phunware-partners-with-noviant.excerpt: Phunware ecosystem expansion with Noviant to provide mobile solutions for pandemic response in healthcare and government sectors.
phunware-partners-with-noviant.body:
Phunware, Inc. (NASDAQ: PHUN), a fully-integrated enterprise cloud platform for mobile that provides products, solutions, data and services for brands worldwide, announced today it has partnered with Noviant to bring Phunware's Pandemic Response Solutions to cities, health systems and small businesses.

Noviant is a technology consulting and managed services company with a focus on delivering secure and innovative digital infrastructure. Through this partnership, Noviant will offer Phunware's mobile-first platform to help its clients manage the complexities of the COVID-19 pandemic, including symptom tracking, facility access management, and communication tools for remote teams.

covid-19-resources.title: Noviant is Committed to Providing You Updated Resources
covid-19-resources.excerpt: Noviant provides critical IT and remote work resources to support businesses during the global pandemic.
covid-19-resources.body:
During these uncertain times, Noviant is committed to being your reliable technology partner. We understand the challenges of transitioning to remote work and maintaining system security.

We have curated a list of resources, from secure VPN setup guides to collaboration tool best practices, to ensure your business remains operational and secure. Our team is available 24/7 to assist with any technical issues and infrastructure adjustments needed to navigate this transition.

notice-to-clients-in-response-to-covid-1.title: Notice to Our Clients: Service Changes in Response to COVID-19
notice-to-clients-in-response-to-covid-1.excerpt: An update on how Noviant is adapting its services to prioritize safety while maintaining enterprise support.
notice-to-clients-in-response-to-covid-1.body:
To prioritize the health of our staff and clients, Noviant is transitioning to fully remote support operations starting March 18, 2020. Our Helpdesk remains fully operational, and we have increased capacity to handle higher volumes of remote access requests.

On-site visits will be limited to critical infrastructure emergencies only. We are committed to providing the same high level of service you expect from us through our secure remote management tools.

benefits-of-windows-virtual-desktop.title: The Benefits of Using Microsoft Azure's Windows Virtual Desktop
benefits-of-windows-virtual-desktop.excerpt: How WVD enables secure, scalable, and remote-friendly computing environments for the modern workforce.
benefits-of-windows-virtual-desktop.body:
Microsoft Azure's Windows Virtual Desktop (WVD) provides the only multi-session Windows 10 experience, optimized for Office 365 ProPlus. It allows businesses to deploy and scale Windows desktops and apps on Azure in minutes, with built-in security and compliance.

Benefits include reduced hardware costs, unified management, and the ability to access a full desktop experience from any device, anywhere. This is a game-changer for businesses implementing flexible work policies.

noviant-certified-for-the-iso-iec-270012.title: Noviant certified for the ISO/IEC 27001:2013
noviant-certified-for-the-iso-iec-270012.excerpt: Noviant achieves global standard for information security management systems.
noviant-certified-for-the-iso-iec-270012.body:
We are proud to announce that Noviant has successfully achieved the ISO/IEC 27001:2013 certification. This internationally recognized standard ensures that our information security management systems are robust and meet the highest security requirements.

This certification reaffirms our commitment to protecting our clients' data and continuous improvement in our internal security processes.

noviant-appears-in-nyc-comptrollers-vide.title: Noviant Appears in NYC Comptroller's Video
noviant-appears-in-nyc-comptrollers-vide.excerpt: Noviant featured by the NYC Comptroller highlighting local technology support for small businesses.
noviant-appears-in-nyc-comptrollers-vide.body:
Noviant was recently featured in a video produced by the NYC Comptroller's Office. The video highlights how local businesses in New York City are leveraging technology to grow and thrive.

Our team is honored to represent the tech sector and show our impact on the New York business community through managed services and infrastructure innovation.

the-era-of-the-pc-isnt-as-over-as-you-mi.title: The era of the PC isn't as over as you might think
the-era-of-the-pc-isnt-as-over-as-you-mi.excerpt: Why the desktop computer remains a cornerstone of enterprise productivity despite the mobile revolution.
the-era-of-the-pc-isnt-as-over-as-you-mi.body:
Despite the rise of smartphones and tablets, the desktop PC remains the primary workhorse for enterprise environments. High-performance tasks, complex data processing, and ergonomics still favor the traditional PC.

Modern infrastructure focuses on how to integrate the PC with cloud services rather than replacing it, ensuring users have the power they need for serious productivity.

windows-8-1-unlikely-to-solve-the-os-pro.title: Windows 8.1 unlikely to solve the OS' problems
windows-8-1-unlikely-to-solve-the-os-pro.excerpt: An analytical look at Windows 8.1 and the persistent challenges of hybrid OS design.
windows-8-1-unlikely-to-solve-the-os-pro.body:
While Windows 8.1 addresses some UI complaints from users, the core tension between touch-first design and desktop productivity remains. Businesses are weighing the benefits of upgrading against potential training costs.

As we look ahead to future iterations, finding a balance between modern tile interfaces and the traditional desktop environment remains Microsoft's biggest challenge.

avoiding-the-e-mail-crush-following-a-va.title: Avoiding the e-mail crush following a vacation
avoiding-the-e-mail-crush-following-a-va.excerpt: Practical tips and filtering strategies to manage an overflowing inbox after time off.
avoiding-the-e-mail-crush-following-a-va.body:
Coming back from vacation shouldn't be defined by an inbox of 500 unread emails. By implementing advanced filtering rules and scheduling focus time, you can prioritize critical communications over noise.

We recommend using categories and automated replies to setting expectations for recovery time, allowing you to transition back to work smoothly without the stress.

why-office-mobile-isnt-a-good-investment.title: Why Office Mobile isn't a good investment
why-office-mobile-isnt-a-good-investment.excerpt: A critical evaluation of mobile Office suites versus full cloud-sync desktop environments.
why-office-mobile-isnt-a-good-investment.body:
For true productivity, mobile apps are often stripped of essential features. Businesses investing in 'mobile-only' licenses often find users reverting to desktop versions to finish complex tasks.

Hybrid cloud environments, where mobile is used for consumption and desktop for creation, remain the most efficient way to deploy Microsoft 365.

theres-another-alternative-for-those-mou.title: There's another alternative for those mourning Google Reader
theres-another-alternative-for-those-mou.excerpt: Exploring RSS feed alternatives to stay updated with industry news after Google Reader's shutdown.
theres-another-alternative-for-those-mou.body:
With Google Reader gone, users are looking for reliable ways to aggregate their technology feeds. Feedly and other specialized aggregators represent the next generation of content consumption.

Effective news monitoring is essential for IT professionals, and choosing the right tool determines how quickly you can respond to emerging trends.

why-tech-less-meetings-should-be-your-go.title: Why tech-less meetings should be your goal
why-tech-less-meetings-should-be-your-go.excerpt: How removing screens from the boardroom can lead to better decision-making and human connection.
why-tech-less-meetings-should-be-your-go.body:
Constant notifications and laptops in meetings lead to distracted teams. 'Tech-less' meetings focus on human interaction, whiteboarding, and active listening, leading to more creative outcomes.

We encourage organizations to designate specific meeting types where devices are deposited at the door to foster absolute focus.
